# jamfprotect_action_configs (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of all action configurations in Jamf Protect. Note: only basic fields are returned by the list API; use the `jamfprotect_action_config` resource to read full details including `alert_config`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all action configurations in Jamf Protect.
# Note: only basic fields (id, name, description, created, updated) are
# returned by the list API. Use the jamfprotect_action_config resource
# to read full details including alert_config.
data "jamfprotect_action_configs" "all" {}

# Output the names of all action configurations.
output "action_config_names" {
  value = [for ac in data.jamfprotect_action_configs.all.action_configs : ac.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `action_configs` (Attributes List) The list of action configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--action_configs))

<a id="nestedatt--action_configs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `action_configs`

Read-Only:

- `created` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) A description of the action configuration.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the action configuration.
- `name` (String) The name of the action configuration.
- `updated` (String) The last-updated timestamp.
